project_type: Full-stack web app: Python FastAPI backend + SvelteKit (Svelte 5) frontend for Contract Lifecycle Management
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py (backend), no frontend tests yet
build_command: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt (backend); cd frontend && npm install && npm run build (frontend)
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend tests: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v. 2. Verify frontend builds: cd frontend && npm run build. 3. Check imports work: cd backend && python -c 'from app.services.llm_service import LLMService; from app.services.drafting_service import DraftingService'
setup_instructions: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt; cd frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet access available. DeepSeek API at api.deepseek.com should be reachable. No Docker daemon needed.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns: docstrings on all functions, type hints, pydantic models for schemas, async/await for services
key_patterns: Backend: pydantic-settings for config (.env), httpx for HTTP calls, OpenAI-compatible chat completions API format, ChromaDB for RAG retrieval, BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing. Frontend: Svelte 5 runes ($state, $derived), TipTap editor with StarterKit, writable stores for state, TailwindCSS for styling.
directory_structure: Root: backend/ (FastAPI app in app/), frontend/ (SvelteKit in src/). Backend structure: app/api/routes/ (endpoints), app/services/ (business logic), app/rag/ (embeddings, ingest, retriever, prompts), app/utils/ (text_processing, excel_parser), app/models/ (pydantic schemas). Frontend: src/routes/ (pages), src/lib/components/ (UI), src/lib/stores/ (state), src/lib/api/ (HTTP client).
